en_title: As Xbox Tries to Sell or Close Arkane, the Future of Marvel's Blade Remains Unclear, With Reports Suggesting It Was Delayed Internally and Is Running Over Budget
cn_title: XBOX或出售Arkane，漫威刀锋战士未来不明
subtitle: 报道称项目已内部延期并超出预算
opus_summary: 随着微软试图出售或关闭Arkane Lyon，漫威刀锋战士的未来仍不明朗。报道称该项目已在内部延期至2027年末，并且超出预算。

paragraphs.en: The future of Marvel鈥檚 Blade remains unclear as Microsoft tries to sell or close its developer, Arkane Lyon.
paragraphs.cn: 随着微软试图出售或关闭开发商Arkane Lyon，漫威刀锋战士的未来仍不明朗。

paragraphs.en: Today, , Xbox CEO Asha Sharma said Arkane鈥檚 management "is beginning required consultation with its Works Council to review potential strategic options." As a French studio, Arkane must follow the country's labor laws around a potential sale or closure, and this process may take some time. Meanwhile, the future of Marvel's Blade, which was in development at Arkane Lyon, remains unclear. Will it be released? Is it canceled? Could another company pick it up, with Arkane Lyon potentially continuing development?
paragraphs.cn: 今天，XBOX CEO Asha Sharma表示，Arkane管理层「正开始与其劳资委员会进行必要协商，以评估潜在战略选择」。作为一家法国工作室，Arkane在可能出售或关闭时必须遵守当地劳动法，这一流程可能需要一段时间。与此同时，由Arkane Lyon开发的漫威刀锋战士未来仍不明朗。它会发售吗？会被取消吗？会不会由另一家公司接手，并可能让Arkane Lyon继续开发？

paragraphs.en: IGN has asked Marvel Games for comment, and Microsoft has yet to expand on Sharma鈥檚 statement.
paragraphs.cn: IGN已向Marvel Games寻求评论，而微软尚未进一步说明Sharma的声明。

paragraphs.en: The Verge reported that Marvel鈥檚 Blade was delayed internally to late 2027 and was running over budget. IGN understands this to be accurate, but neither Microsoft nor Marvel has suggested a release window. Blade, from the team behind Deathloop, was announced in December 2023 with a reveal trailer, but we've seen nothing of it since.
paragraphs.cn: The Verge报道称，漫威刀锋战士已在内部延期至2027年末，并且超出预算。IGN了解到这一说法属实，但微软和Marvel都没有给出发售窗口。《刀锋战士》由《死亡循环》团队开发，2023年12月通过公布预告片正式发表，但此后再也没有公开展示。

paragraphs.en: Last month, Bethesda Game Studios head Todd Howard was quoted as saying he'd recently seen what Arkane Lyon was cooking up and was impressed . "I'm not at liberty to say when [we'll see more]," Howard teased, "but I saw some stuff just yesterday [on May 21] and the folks at Arkane [Studios, the developers] are doing a really, really great job." Fans first began to fear the worst after Blade was a no-show at last month's Xbox Games Showcase.
paragraphs.cn: 上个月，贝塞斯达 Game Studios负责人陶德·霍华德曾被引用称，他最近看到了Arkane Lyon正在制作的内容，并对此印象深刻。Howard卖关子说：「我不能说我们什么时候会看到更多内容，但我昨天（5月21日）刚看了一些东西，Arkane（Studios的开发者）的人做得真的非常非常好。」在《刀锋战士》缺席上个月的XBOX游戏发布会后，粉丝首次开始担心最坏情况。

paragraphs.en: Today, Microsoft announced 3,200 staff are set to lose their jobs at Xbox across the current financial year, with 1,600 of those layoffs happening today, July 6. In an email sent to staff, Sharma called it the most 鈥渟ignificant鈥?restructure in Xbox history, insisting Microsoft鈥檚 gaming business 鈥渋s not healthy.鈥?Overall, Xbox is losing about one-fifth of its staff as part of Sharma's push for growth.
paragraphs.cn: 今天，微软宣布本财年XBOX将有3200名员工失去工作，其中1600人的裁员会在7月6日当天发生。在发给员工的邮件中，Sharma称这是XBOX史上最「重大」的重组，并坚称微软的游戏业务「并不健康」。总体而言，作为Sharma推动增长的一部分，XBOX将失去约五分之一员工。

paragraphs.en: South of Midnight developer Compulsion Games and Psychonauts developer Double Fine Productions will return to management and transition to independent studios with their IP, catalog, and with 鈥渞unway for their next games,鈥?Sharma said. These games are so far unannounced. In Double Fine's case, it leaves Microsoft with the Psychonauts IP.
paragraphs.cn: Sharma表示，《午夜之南》开发商Compulsion Games和《意航员》开发商Double Fine Productions将回归自主管理，并带着各自IP、作品目录以及「下一款游戏的缓冲空间」转型为独立工作室。这些新游戏目前尚未公布。就Double Fine而言，这意味着微软仍保留《意航员》IP。

paragraphs.en: Meanwhile, Hellblade developer Ninja Theory and State of Decay developer Undead Labs 鈥渉ave entered terms to join new ownership with funding to complete and grow Senua and State of Decay 3.鈥?This suggests both games will release eventually, developed under new ownership. Microsoft did not say who the new owners are.
paragraphs.cn: 与此同时，《地狱之刃》开发商Ninja Theory和《腐烂国度》开发商Undead Labs「已达成条款，将加入新的所有权结构，并获得用于完成和发展《塞娜》与《腐烂国度3》的资金」。这表明两款游戏最终都会发售，并将在新所有者旗下开发。微软没有说明新所有者是谁。

paragraphs.en: Elsewhere, there are layoffs across other parts of Xbox, including Activision, Bethesda/ZeniMax, Blizzard, King, Mojang, and Xbox Game Studios. Microsoft insisted none of its first-party publicly announced games or projects are being cancelled as part of these reductions. That means the likes of Fable, Gears of War: E-Day, Clockwork Revolution, Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4, Minecraft Dungeons 2, and The Elder Scrolls 6 are safe.
paragraphs.cn: 此外，XBOX其他部门也在裁员，包括Activision、贝塞斯达/ZeniMax、Blizzard、King、Mojang和XBOX Game Studios。微软坚称，这些裁员不会导致其已经公开公布的第一方游戏或项目被取消。这意味着《神鬼寓言》《战争机器：事变日》《发条革命》《使命召唤：现代战争4》《我的世界：地下城2》和《上古卷轴6》等项目是安全的。

paragraphs.en: We have much more on this developing story over at our live blog , which we will continue to update as today's news unfolds.
paragraphs.cn: 关于这起仍在发展的事件，我们在实时博客中有更多内容，并会随着今天消息继续展开而持续更新。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN新闻总监。你可以在Twitter上通过@wyp100找到他，也可以通过wesley_yinpoole@ign.com联系Wesley，或通过wyp100@proton.me进行保密联系。
